cases.prompt: Set up the Purview unified catalog with governance domains and data products.

expect.label: Start with a few high-value governance domains and data products; broad rollout without ownership fails
Curation is a continuous programme, not a one-time load
Align catalog access with Data Map collection permissions (AND, not OR)
Rule of thumb: start with 2-3 domains and 5-10 data products

cases.prompt: Which governance domains should I start with?

expect.label: Start with 2-3 high-pain business areas (Finance, Customer, HR), not the whole org chart
Each domain needs a named business owner with weekly time, not an IT proxy

cases.prompt: How many data products should one steward own?

expect.label: Cap at ~10 products per steward; more becomes a queue, not stewardship
Stewardship workload less than 4 hours per week or it stops happening
